scope: Tier-1 declarative migration of legacy internal/connectors/opinion-stage: the items stream only. Legacy's responses/questions substreams (GET /api/v2/items/{id}/responses, GET /api/v2/items/{id}/questions) require a list-then-fan-out-per-parent-id read, which the declarative dialect's single-fixed-path StreamSpec cannot express (no parent-id fan-out primitive); Tier-2 StreamHook Go would close this but is out of scope for this migration pass (see docs.md Known limits).

excluded.reason: per-item substream fan-out requires a StreamHook (Tier 2); Tier-1-only migration pass
per-item substream fan-out requires a StreamHook (Tier 2); Tier-1-only migration pass
